name: Broccoli-Mushroom Scallop
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Fresh broccoli, washed and cut into 2-inch pieces
1 cup Sliced fresh mushrooms (or 4 oz Can sliced mushrooms, drained)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the broccoli in a deep, 2 1/2-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole, covered, in Microwave Oven for 8 to 9 minutes. (Note: If frozen broccoli spears are used, defrost and place in a shallow, 9-inch, heat-resistant, non-metallic baking dish.)
2. In a small, heat-resistant, non-metallic bowl, combine butter, mushrooms, and onion. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 3 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Blend flour and seasonings into the butter-mushroom mixture. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 3 minutes, stirring after 1 1/2 minutes.
4. Gradually add milk, stirring until the mixture is smooth. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 3 minutes, stirring every minute.
5. Pour the hot mushroom sauce over the cooked broccoli. Sprinkle with 1 cup cheese and paprika. Heat, uncovered, for 4 to 5 minutes or until the cheese is melted.
